dialogues.title: Completion
dialogues.message: Congratulations! You have completed the level

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Special Agent Nut enters the scene.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: His most deadly mission yet: return home before Winter.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Thus he embarks on a long and arduous quest.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Where he must conquer the perilous terrain.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Only then can he return home to his family.
